title: Data centers are ready to negotiate flexibility for speed
snippet: Hyperscalers want their data centers online and utilities want to provide interconnections, but experts say both are still looking for common operating guidelines.
ai_summary: Data centers negotiating flexibility arrangements with utilities is a growing market trend relevant to tem's flex and trading operations, though this piece appears US-focused and lacks UK-specific detail.
ai_reasoning: This is background industry reading on demand-side flexibility and utility partnerships. Relevant to tem's flex/trading business model, but generic without UK market specificity, competitor mentions, or regulatory impact. Worth monitoring the trend but no immediate action required.
